article_title: More people around the world now favour China over the US, Pew study suggests

tasks.prompt: What is the central finding discussed in the article?
options: Global views of China have improved relative to views of the United States
Every country now has identical views of China and the United States
The survey found that foreign policy no longer affects public opinion
Most respondents refused to compare the two powers
tasks.correct_answer: Global views of China have improved relative to views of the United States
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הממצא המרכזי הוא שעמדות כלפי סין השתפרו יחסית לעמדות כלפי ארצות הברית במדינות שנבדקו.

tasks.prompt: Which organisation conducted the study mentioned in the headline?
options: The World Bank
Pew Research Center
The United Nations Security Council
The International Monetary Fund
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכותרת מציינת שמדובר במחקר של Pew.

options: Officials who design foreign policy
Journalists who publish the results
People who answer the survey questions
Countries excluded from the research
tasks.correct_answer: People who answer the survey questions
tasks.explanation_hebrew: respondents הם הנשאלים או המשיבים לסקר.

tasks.prompt: Why might the article use a median when comparing countries?
options: To focus only on the largest country
To identify the middle value across a set of country results
To remove all differences between respondents
To predict the exact result of the next election
tasks.correct_answer: To identify the middle value across a set of country results
tasks.explanation_hebrew: חציון הוא הערך האמצעי, ולכן הוא מסכם אוסף תוצאות בלי להיות מושפע מדי מערכים קיצוניים.

tasks.prompt: What does the presence of large swings and volatility suggest about international perceptions?
options: They are fixed permanently by geography
They can change in response to leaders, events, and political rhetoric
They depend only on the size of a country's population
They are unaffected by foreign policy
tasks.correct_answer: They can change in response to leaders, events, and political rhetoric
tasks.explanation_hebrew: תנודות וחוסר יציבות מצביעים על כך שעמדות הציבור יכולות להשתנות בעקבות אירועים, מנהיגים ורטוריקה.

tasks.prompt: Which statement best captures the article's broader message?
options: China has replaced the United States in every measurable area
Public opinion is uniform across all regions
The reputational gap between China and the US has narrowed, but views remain complex and uneven
Polling can prove which political system is objectively best
tasks.correct_answer: The reputational gap between China and the US has narrowed, but views remain complex and uneven
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הפער התדמיתי הצטמצם, אך העמדות אינן אחידות והן משתנות בין מדינות והקשרים.

tasks.prompt: Identify two factors discussed in the article that can shape perceptions of China or the United States.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש לציין שני גורמים רלוונטיים, כגון מדיניות חוץ, התנהגות מנהיגים, רטוריקה, התערבות במדינות אחרות או שימוש באמצעי כפייה.
expected_points: Mentions foreign policy or interference in other countries
Mentions political leadership, rhetoric, or international conduct
May mention assertive, expansive, or coercive behaviour

tasks.prompt: Explain why a rise in favourable views of China does not necessarily mean respondents approve of every aspect of China's government or foreign policy.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להבחין בין השוואה יחסית לבין תמיכה מלאה, ולהסביר שאנשים יכולים להעדיף מדינה אחת ובו בזמן לבקר מאפיינים סמכותניים או כופים שלה.
expected_points: Distinguishes relative preference from complete approval
Notes that respondents may still criticise authoritarian or coercive policies
Recognizes that views can differ by issue and country

tasks.prompt: Write a 3-4 sentence summary of the Pew study's reported trend and the cautions needed when interpreting it.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: הסיכום צריך לתאר את השיפור היחסי בעמדות כלפי סין, את ההשוואה לארה״ב ואת העובדה שהנתונים משתנים בין מדינות ואינם מעידים על תמיכה מוחלטת.
expected_points: States that favourable views of China rose relative to the US
Attributes the finding to a Pew survey
Notes variation across countries or respondents
Avoids presenting the result as universal or permanent

tasks.prompt: Write a short analytical paragraph on how a country can burnish its international image without changing its political system.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: יש להציג טענה מנומקת ולדון בכלים כגון דיפלומטיה, מסחר, סיוע, מסרים ציבוריים והתנהגות צפויה, לצד מגבלות הנובעות ממדיניות סמכותנית או כופה.
expected_points: Explains at least two ways a country can improve its image
Connects image-building to diplomacy, economic ties, aid, or rhetoric
Acknowledges that coercive or authoritarian actions can limit reputational gains
